title: Request to upgrade bundled tmp dependency to >= 0.2.6 to remediate GHSA-ph9p-34f9-6g65 (CVE-2026-44705)
author: tibindominicphilips
body:
Hi,

We are reaching out to request an upgrade of the tmp package that is bundled as a direct dependency of exceljs. The currently pinned version is affected by GHSA-ph9p-34f9-6g65 vulnerability.

Current state
exceljs@4.4.0 declares "tmp": "^0.2.0", which resolves to tmp@0.2.5. This is being flagged as vulnerability in projects that consume exceljs.

Requesting this upgrade to make the consuming applications vlnerability free.

Thanks,
Tibin Dominic

comments.author: Ehan1213
comments.body: Yea, having the same issue in my project both for uuid and tmp packages... the project might be dead.

comments.author: gameroman
comments.body:
I think you can use `"overrides"`

https://pnpm.io/settings#overrides

https://docs.npmjs.com/cli/v11/configuring-npm/package-json#overrides

comments.author: takomine
comments.body: almost all of my overrides settings is just for exceljs. are there any alternatives for this package?

comments.author: gameroman
comments.body:
> almost all of my overrides settings is just for exceljs. are there any alternatives for this package?

Try one of these which are more actively maintained forks

https://github.com/excel-js/exceljs

https://github.com/cjnoname/excelts

https://github.com/protobi/exceljs

You can also see a [comparison on npmx](https://npmx.dev/compare?packages=exceljs,@cj-tech-master/excelts,@excel.js/exceljs,@protobi/exceljs)
